reviews.comment:
Muy amable el playero, el precio normal. Se debe tener cuidado pues hay automovilistas que usan la estación como dársena para acceder a la calle lateral.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant was very friendly, and the price was reasonable. Be careful, as there are motorists who use the station as a loading dock to access the side street.
